examples.title: CAP Theorem: Consistency, Availability, Partition Tolerance
examples.description: Pseudocode illustrating the CAP theorem trade-offs
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CAPTheorem
INPUT: Request
OUTPUT: Response

BEGIN
 IF Partition THEN
 IF PrioritizeConsistency THEN
 SacrificeAvailability
 ELSE
 SacrificeConsistency
 END IF
 RETURN Response
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the fundamental trade-off between consistency, availability, and partition tolerance in distributed systems.

examples.title: Byzantine Generals Problem: Signed Messages Algorithm
examples.description: Python implementation of the signed messages algorithm for Byzantine fault tolerance
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates the signed messages algorithm for Byzantine fault tolerance, ensuring that messages cannot be forged or altered.
